description: You are a Database Developer at a music streaming startup. The engineering team needs a Physical Entity-Relationship Diagram (ERD) for the Chinook database before migration to a new cloud data warehouse. Using the SQL schema at ~/Desktop/chinook_schema.sql, create a complete Physical ERD in draw.io documenting all 11 tables: Artist, Album, Track, MediaType, Genre, Playlist, PlaylistTrack, Invoice, InvoiceLine, Customer, and Employee. Each entity must show columns with PK and FK indicators and relationship lines using crow's foot notation. Organize the entities into at least 3 logical subject-area groups (e.g., Media Catalog, Sales/Invoicing, People/HR). Include a second diagram page titled 'Relationship Summary' listing each foreign key relationship as text. Save the diagram to ~/Desktop/chinook_erd.drawio and export a PNG copy to ~/Desktop/chinook_erd.png. Login: username=ga, password=password123
